join_order.notes: Load sub/fy.bin once; build flat bool array fy2023[86135] indexed by adsh_code (84KB, fits in L3). Also stage sub/name.bin as flat int32 array for name_code lookup. Applied per-row during num scan: fy2023[n.adsh_code].

join_order.build: pre_key_sorted (pre-built sorted index, 153MB, loaded once shared read-only)
join_order.notes: For each qualifying num row, std::lower_bound on pre_key_sorted entries by (adsh_code, tag_code, ver_code). Walk forward while keys match; for each matching entry check pre/stmt.bin[row_id] == is_code. Yields ~1 matching pre IS row per qualifying num row on average.

filters.notes: Load usd_code from shared/uom.dict at runtime; use num_zonemaps to skip non-USD blocks
std::isnan(value) sentinel; checked per-row during scan
Applied as direct array lookup fy2023[adsh_code] during num scan; ~16,219 qualifying adsh codes
Load is_code from shared/stmt.dict at runtime; checked after pre_key_sorted lookup via pre/stmt.bin[row_id]

data_structures.sub_fy_filter: flat_bool_array[86135] — direct index by adsh_code; 84KB; fits in L3 cache
data_structures.sub_name_lookup: flat_int32_array[86135] — direct index by adsh_code; loaded from sub/name.bin
data_structures.pre_stmt_column: flat_int8_array[9600799] — pre/stmt.bin loaded into RAM; O(1) check after index lookup
data_structures.pre_index: pre_key_sorted — mmap or fully loaded sorted PreKeyEntry[9600799] (153MB); shared read-only across threads
data_structures.aggregation: compact_hash_map(pre_sized ~100K groups) per thread — key: (name_code:int32, stmt_code:int8, tag_code:int32, pre_row_id:int32); value: (sum_value:double, count:int64); thread-local to avoid contention; merged after scan

parallelism.notes: Partition the USD block range from num_zonemaps across 64 threads in 100K-row morsels. Each thread independently scans its morsels, probes fy2023 array, binary-searches pre_key_sorted (read-only, no contention), and accumulates into a thread-local hash map. After all morsels complete, merge thread-local maps into global result.

indexes.purpose: skip_blocks — scan num_zonemaps.bin to find first block where uom_min <= usd_code <= uom_max; skip all blocks where uom_max < usd_code or uom_min > usd_code; reduces scan range to contiguous USD-containing blocks
join_lookup — O(log N) binary search per qualifying num row on sorted (adsh, tag, ver) composite key; walk forward for multi-match; avoids hash-building 9.6M pre rows

group_key.notes: pre_row_id used as plabel identity proxy — unique per (adsh,tag,ver) tuple in pre. Varlen plabel decoded only for top-200 rows at output time via pre/plabel.offsets + pre/plabel.data.

output.sort_strategy: partial_sort or min-heap of size 200 over ~100K groups
